channel.title: Fairy Tao Stories
channel.description:
Fairy Tao Stories — Bedtime audio for children ages 2-6.
Each 6-8 minute story is told by Fairy Tao, a gentle storyteller who guides your child through wonder, kindness, courage, and quiet sleep. Original watercolor narration paired with soft music — no shouting, no flashing visuals, just calm and warmth.
Themes range from glowing fireflies and slow snails, to lost moon-calves and brave little teapots — every story written from scratch (no public-domain remix), tested for the YouTube Kids quality bar (Cocomelon / Bluey / Ms Rachel level).
Originally produced for YouTube Kids. Audio podcast version is identical narration, perfect for car rides, bedtime, and quiet weekend afternoons.
Host: Fairy Tao (姐姐 / Sister Tao) Format: Single-narrator audio storytelling (English) Release: 1-2 episodes per week For: Parents reading to ages 2-6 / ESL families / commute-time listening
This show is AI-assisted: human-written original stories, AI voice synthesis (consistent voice persona), and original AI-generated background music.
Contact: dingqing1981@gmail.com
channel.itunes:author: Fairy Tao
channel.itunes:summary:
Fairy Tao Stories — Bedtime audio for children ages 2-6.
Each 6-8 minute story is told by Fairy Tao, a gentle storyteller who guides your child through wonder, kindness, courage, and quiet sleep. Original watercolor narration paired with soft music — no shouting, no flashing visuals, just calm and warmth.
Themes range from glowing fireflies and slow snails, to lost moon-calves and brave little teapots — every story written from scratch (no public-domain remix), tested for the YouTube Kids quality bar (Cocomelon / Bluey / Ms Rachel level).
Originally produced for YouTube Kids. Audio podcast version is identical narration, perfect for car rides, bedtime, and quiet weekend afternoons.
Host: Fairy Tao (姐姐 / Sister Tao) Format: Single-narrator audio storytelling (English) Release: 1-2 episodes per week For: Parents reading to ages 2-6 / ESL families / commute-time listening
This show is AI-assisted: human-written original stories, AI voice synthesis (consistent voice persona), and original AI-generated background music.
Contact: dingqing1981@gmail.com
channel.itunes:subtitle: Bilingual bedtime stories for curious little ones

item.title: A02 The Slow Snail - A Moonlit Field
item.description:
🌙 A slow little snail named A-Niu is left behind on a moonlit field path. Is slow really bad? In the dewdrops, what shines is not half a moon, but the whole moon.
Welcome to Fairy Tao Stories. Tonight, follow A-Niu through the rice field at the edge of the peach blossom forest — slowly gliding over grass tips, gazing into dewdrop after dewdrop. Slow is another way of seeing.
For ages 2-6, perfect for bedtime listening.
—— Fairy Tao Stories A02 ——
This episode is AI-assisted. Feedback: dingqing1981@gmail.com
item.content:encoded:
🌙 A slow little snail named A-Niu is left behind on a moonlit field path. Is slow really bad? In the dewdrops, what shines is not half a moon, but the whole moon.
Welcome to Fairy Tao Stories. Tonight, follow A-Niu through the rice field at the edge of the peach blossom forest — slowly gliding over grass tips, gazing into dewdrop after dewdrop. Slow is another way of seeing.
For ages 2-6, perfect for bedtime listening.
—— Fairy Tao Stories A02 ——
This episode is AI-assisted. Feedback: dingqing1981@gmail.com

item.itunes:author: Fairy Tao
item.itunes:summary:
🌙 A slow little snail named A-Niu is left behind on a moonlit field path. Is slow really bad? In the dewdrops, what shines is not half a moon, but the whole moon.
Welcome to Fairy Tao Stories. Tonight, follow A-Niu through the rice field at the edge of the peach blossom forest — slowly gliding over grass tips, gazing into dewdrop after dewdrop. Slow is another way of seeing.
For ages 2-6, perfect for bedtime listening.
—— Fairy Tao Stories A02 ——
This episode is AI-assisted. Feedback: dingqing1981@gmail.com
item.itunes:subtitle: 7 min original bedtime story

item.title: A01 The Glowing Firefly - Tiny Light, Big Path
item.description:
🌙 A tiny firefly's light is only the size of a rice grain. Is it really too small? Slowly, gently, tonight we go deep into the peach blossom forest.
Welcome to Fairy Tao Stories. Tonight's story belongs to a little firefly named Twinkle — his light is the pale yellow of a rice grain, freshly learned. When he meets Sparkle, whose light shines like a tiny lantern, he quietly folds his wings. Until a row of newborn fireflies follow his tiny light through the grass...
For ages 2-6, perfect for bedtime listening.
—— Fairy Tao Stories A01 ——
This episode is AI-assisted. Feedback: dingqing1981@gmail.com

Welcome to Fairy Tao Stories. Tonight's story belongs to a little firefly named Twinkle — his light is the pale yellow of a rice grain, freshly learned. When he meets Sparkle, whose light shines like a tiny lantern, he quietly folds his wings. Until a row of newborn fireflies follow his tiny light through the grass...
For ages 2-6, perfect for bedtime listening.
—— Fairy Tao Stories A01 ——

Welcome to Fairy Tao Stories. Tonight's story belongs to a little firefly named Twinkle — his light is the pale yellow of a rice grain, freshly learned. item.itunes:subtitle: 8 min original bedtime story

item.title: Trailer — Fairy Tao Stories
item.description:
Hello, little ones — I'm Fairy Tao.
Bedtime audio for children ages 2-6. Each 6-8 minute story is told by a gentle storyteller in the peach blossom forest, where the moon is always soft. No yelling, no flashing screens — just warmth, wonder, and one quiet voice on the way to sleep.
Find us each week in your favorite podcast app.
item.content:encoded:
Hello, little ones — I'm Fairy Tao.
Bedtime audio for children ages 2-6. Each 6-8 minute story is told by a gentle storyteller in the peach blossom forest, where the moon is always soft. No yelling, no flashing screens — just warmth, wonder, and one quiet voice on the way to sleep.
Find us each week in your favorite podcast app.

item.itunes:subtitle: Bedtime stories for curious little ones, ages 2-6
